name: BLOOM (176B)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (ALiBi positional encoding, GPT-2-style, GeLU)
note: First openly-released 100B+ LLM, built by 1000+ BigScience researchers across 46 natural + 13 programming languages under RAIL license.

results.notes: 25-shot acc_norm (harness|arc:challenge|25 = 0.50427), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation-run JSON for bigscience/bloom (confirmed config_general.model_name = 'bigscience/bloom', the 176B model), confirmed via direct fetch of the raw results JSON.
10-shot acc_norm (harness|hellaswag|10 = 0.76409), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation-run JSON for bigscience/bloom, confirmed via direct fetch of the raw results JSON.

5-shot, average accuracy across all 57 harness|hendrycksTest-*|5 subtasks (avg acc = 0.30854), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation-run JSON for bigscience/bloom, computed directly from the raw results JSON using the leaderboard's standard MMLU aggregation method.
TruthfulQA MC2 (harness|truthfulqa:mc|0, mc2 = 0.39760), 0-shot, HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation-run JSON for bigscience/bloom, confirmed via direct fetch of the raw results JSON.

verificationNotes: Confirmed on HF model card: 176,247,271,424 params (176.25B), RAIL v1.0 license, 2048-token context, 46 natural + 13 programming languages (59 total), HumanEval pass@1 15.5% all literally present on the page. July 11, 2022 release date matches the well-documented coordinated BLOOM family release. No changes made.
